MASTER CALENDAR COURT, JAN-29-2024, DEPT. 206, APPEARANCES BY W. WAYNE YATES, JR., ESQ., FOR PLAINTIFF LANE LABBE, TRUSTEE OF THE LABBE FAMILY TRUST; EDWARD SINGER, JR., ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT DAVID RAYNAL. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-29-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303, JUDGE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. THE COURT ALSO SETS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTYS. W. WAYNE YATES, JR. EDWARD C. SINGER, JR., FOR FEB--09-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 10:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE OR PARTIES MAY FILE DECLARATIONS TO BE HEARD AT THE OSC HEARING ON 2/9/24. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
